decisions.briefing: Markets are broadly risk-on today with NASDAQ +1.3% and S&P +0.7%, a constructive backdrop. However, with only $105 cash on hand — well below the $500 threshold — there is no capital available to open new positions. BILL (score 100, RSI 63.9) is the top candidate in a healthy bullish momentum zone (not overbought) and should be first priority when cash is freed up via a profit target or stop-loss trigger on existing holdings. All six current positions are held.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on May 8, with the NASDAQ outperforming as tech and growth stocks led gains. Risk sentiment improved following signals of progress in U.S.-China trade negotiations, which lifted tariff-sensitive sectors and high-beta names. Investors rotated into cyclical and momentum names, with small- and mid-cap growth stocks seeing outsized volume surges reflected across the screener.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於5月8日全面上漲，納斯達克指數領先大市，科技及成長股表現突出。市場風險偏好回升，主因美中貿易談判傳出進展，關稅敏感板塊及高貝塔股份受惠明顯。資金流向周期性及動能股，中小型成長股成交量出現顯著放大，與選股篩選器所呈現的大量成交量激增訊號吻合。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast a stock has been moving. An RSI between 55 and 70 is considered the 'sweet spot' — the stock has strong upward momentum but isn't yet overbought. Today's top candidate BILL sits at RSI 63.9, which is more attractive than the many candidates crowded above 70, where mean-reversion risk is elevated.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股價上漲或下跌的速度。RSI介於55至70之間被視為「黃金區間」——股票具備強勁上行動能，但尚未進入超買狀態。今日最佳候選股BILL的RSI為63.9，相比大量RSI超過70的候選股更具吸引力，因為超買區間的均值回歸風險較高，隨時可能出現技術性回調。
